label: Clearly positive
text: This movie was absolutely fantastic, the acting was great and I loved every minute!

label: Clearly negative
text: Terrible film, complete waste of time. Bad acting and a boring plot.

label: Mixed / ambiguous
text: It was okay, not great but not terrible either.

label: Strongly negative
text: One of the worst movies I have ever seen, I want my money back.

label: Strongly positive
text: A masterpiece of modern cinema, beautifully shot and deeply moving.
